description: Generated Notion API Users read-only OpenAPI MCP catalog manifest.

notes: Official Notion API OpenAPI document, published live at https://developers.notion.com/openapi.json.
Document info: title "Notion API", version 1.0.0, OpenAPI 3.1.0.
All Notion API requests also require a Notion-Version request header; the importer selects only the operations below and does not model request headers in this manifest.
The committed manifest selects read-only Notion Users list/get operations only.

network: GET https://api.notion.com/v1/users for selected upstream operation
GET https://api.notion.com/v1/users/{user_id} for selected upstream operation
process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
